name: Jet Flanger
explanation: A modulated short-delay flanger: a swept fractional delay (about 0.2 to 10 ms) is read with linear interpolation and summed with the dry signal to form a moving comb filter. A bipolar Regen (feedback) control deepens the resonant notches, with negative settings giving the hollow, metallic through-zero-style jet sweep. Controls: Rate, Depth, Regen, Manual base delay and dry/wet Mix.
